systems.system_notes: Cemented revision hip platform built around the Exeter femoral stem family for revision and complex femoral reconstruction cases.

trays.tray_notes: Official Exeter materials state the implant and instrument system is designed to accommodate revision cases.

components.component_notes: Official Exeter materials describe a wide offset and body-size range used across primary, revision, and fracture workflows.
Revision use continues to rely on compatible femoral head options within the Exeter V40 platform.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public Exeter materials confirm revision indication and stem family detail but this pass does not expand a revision SKU table.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue or IFU pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
